ai_tools.card_1_desc: Elite training with AI agents to boost your productivity and cognitive learning.
ai_tools.card_2_desc: Business Automation Center with AI. Diagnosis, ROI and architecture aligned with international standards.
ai_tools.card_3_desc: We identify your unique learning style through cognitive vision algorithms and natural language processing.
ai_tools.card_4_desc: Academic and emotional support platform with Valerio AI.
ai_tools.subtitle: Ecosystem of cognitive solutions designed to enhance learning through AI and Neuroscience.
ecosystem.card_1_desc: Comprehensive support based on VAK and STEAM methodologies. Teachers with master's degrees analyze psychological and academic processes to enhance each learning style with personalized AI tools.
ecosystem.card_2_desc: Official SenaTIC operators. We certify over 6,000 students with international backing from IBM and Coursera. Teachers training teachers: more than 200 Colombian educators transformed into digital leaders.
ecosystem.card_3_desc: We transform educational organizations and companies with applied STEAM methodology. Custom AI agents and high-level training that generate real productivity from the first month of implementation.
ecosystem.subtitle: Access structured tools to enhance education through the synergy of neuroscience and artificial intelligence.
esencia.mission_text: To democratize quality education through artificial intelligence tools that adapt to each student's unique learning style.
esencia.subtitle: We are a team of master's degree holders, pedagogues, and developers passionate about transforming education through artificial intelligence.
esencia.value_1_desc: AI at the service of education
esencia.vision_text: To be the leading platform in Latin America for integrating pedagogical methodologies with artificial intelligence to train the professionals of the future.
final_cta.card_1_desc: Discover how you learn best with our learning style test. No registration required, direct and free.
final_cta.card_2_desc: Calculate the ROI of implementing AI in your organization or design custom automation workflows.
hero.subtitle_before: Cognitive infrastructure powered by artificial intelligence. Your learning environment evolves and adjusts
metodo.form_interest_label: What would you like to transform?
metodo.form_privacy: By submitting, you agree to be contacted to receive information about our educational services.
metodo.step_1_desc: We identify your unique learning style through our AI system.
metodo.step_2_desc: We design a STEAM curriculum adapted to your neuro-cognitive strengths.
metodo.step_3_desc: Apply what you've learned on the interactive SmartBoard with expert mentors.
metodo.step_4_desc: Get official credentials backed by global tech giants.
metodo.subtitle: A clear process, designed by master's degree holders, guided by Artificial Intelligence and focused on measurable results.
metodo.success_desc: A specialist advisor will contact you within the next 24 hours to guide you through your educational transformation.
pricing.faq_1_question: How does the VAK Diagnosis work?
pricing.faq_3_question: Can I cancel at any time?

pricing.footer_cta: Didn't find what you're looking for?
pricing.plan_basico_description: For individuals who want to transform their personal learning.
pricing.plan_profesional_description: For teachers and educators revolutionizing their classroom.
pricing.subtitle: From individual students to entire institutions, we have the perfect plan for you.
ova.buildgpt.welcome_desc: Hi, I'm Valerio, your AI coach. In this lab I'll guide you step by step to create your own GPT with actions and connections to external APIs. Let's go!
ova.buildgpt.welcome_audio: Hi, I'm Valerio, your AI coach from Edutechlife. In this lab I'll guide you step by step to create your own custom GPT with actions and external API connections. Let's start this adventure together.
ova.buildgpt.intro_text: Custom GPTs are adapted versions of ChatGPT that you can create for a specific task, with custom instructions, knowledge, and actions.
ova.buildgpt.intro_gpt_desc: Follows specific instructions, uses your knowledge base, and connects to external APIs.
ova.buildgpt.intro_actions_desc: Connect your GPT with external services like Google Sheets, Slack, or your own API.
ova.buildgpt.slack_title: Step 1: Set up a GPT for Slack
ova.buildgpt.slack_desc: Transform educational communication with a GPT connected to your team.
ova.buildgpt.google_desc: Connect your GPT with Gmail, Google Docs and Sheets.
ova.buildgpt.api_desc: Connect your GPT with the outside world through custom Actions.
ova.buildgpt.api_connect_desc: Your GPT can call any external API using OpenAI Actions.
ova.buildgpt.api_webhook_desc: Your GPT can react to external events in real time.
ova.buildgpt.activity_desc: Select the pieces to configure your GPT with actions.
ova.buildgpt.activity_step1: 1. What event will trigger your GPT?
ova.buildgpt.activity_step2: 2. What should your GPT do with the information?
ova.buildgpt.activity_step3: 3. Where will it send the result?
ova.buildgpt.activity_done_desc: This is how a GPT with Actions works: event → intelligence → result.
ova.buildgpt.quiz_perfect: Perfect score! Valerio is proud of you.
ova.buildgpt.quiz_good: Good job! Review any concepts you're unsure about.
ova.buildgpt.quiz_bad: Don't worry, review the lab and try again. Valerio believes in you.
ova.buildgpt.cert_desc: You've completed the lab guided by Valerio. Now you know how to create custom GPTs with actions.
ova.buildgpt.footer: Lab guided by Valerio — AI Coach from Edutechlife.
ova.introprompt.welcome_desc: Hi, I'm Valerio, your AI coach. In this lab we'll discover what prompts are, their anatomy, types, and how to write them for high-quality responses.
ova.introprompt.welcome_audio: Hi, I'm Valerio, your AI coach from Edutechlife. In this lab we'll learn what a prompt is — the most important tool for communicating with artificial intelligence. We'll explore its anatomy, types, common mistakes, and how to improve them.
ova.introprompt.whatis_tip: The prompt is the most important skill when using AI. A good prompt can be the difference between a generic response and a precise, useful solution.
ova.introprompt.quiz_bad: Review the lab. Valerio believes in you.
ova.introprompt.footer: Lab guided by Valerio — AI Coach from Edutechlife.
ova.podcastguide.welcome_desc: Discover how to transform the way you study, research, and organize information using the power of Google's artificial intelligence.
ova.podcastguide.welcome_voice: Welcome to the interactive course NotebookLM in Practice. I'm Valerio, your AI coach. Throughout 6 modules you'll learn from the fundamentals to advanced applications of NotebookLM. Each module includes practical activities to check your learning.
ova.podcastguide.ready_question: Are you ready for the future of learning?
ova.podcastguide.cert_message: You're ready to use Artificial Intelligence as a true expert in your research.
ova.podcastguide.cert_voice: Congratulations! You have completed the NotebookLM course. You're ready to use Artificial Intelligence as an expert in your research.
ova.biaslab.game_desc: Match each case with the correct ethical concept
ova.biaslab.game_complete_desc: You have completed the AI Ethics lab.
ova.biaslab.footer: Lab guided by Valerio — AI Coach from Edutechlife.
ova.risksim.title: Artificial Intelligence Ethics
ova.risksim.subtitle: Responsible Use, Risks, Biases and How to Mitigate Them
ova.risksim.click_hint: Click on each card to discover how to act:
ova.risksim.decalogue_title: Decalogue of the Ethical AI User
ova.risksim.decalogue_1: I always verify information before using or sharing it.
ova.risksim.decalogue_2: I declare when I use AI in my academic and professional work.
ova.risksim.decalogue_3: I use AI to learn more and better, not to avoid the effort of learning.
ova.risksim.decalogue_4: I remember that behind every AI system there are human decisions, and those decisions are questionable.
ova.risksim.game_desc: Solve the practical cases by selecting the stars
ova.risksim.completion_desc: You have completed the risk assessment simulator.
ova.risksim.fallback_feedback: Incorrect. Remember to apply critical thinking.
ova.risksim.footer: Simulator guided by Valerio — AI Coach from Edutechlife.
ova.risksim.welcome_voice: Welcome to the AI risk assessment simulator. Explore the educational content and complete the ethical stars challenge.
ova.podcaststudio.title: Create your Audio Overview
ova.podcaststudio.subtitle: NotebookLM · For any course or subject
ova.podcaststudio.welcome_desc: Hi, I'm Valerio. Answer 3 questions about your project and you'll receive a personalized plan with recommendations and a checklist to create your podcast in NotebookLM. It works for any topic: history, science, technology, art, business...
ova.podcaststudio.welcome_voice: Hi, I'm Valerio. Answer 3 questions about your project and you'll receive a personalized plan with recommendations and a checklist to create your podcast in NotebookLM. It works for any subject: history, science, technology, art, business, whatever you study.
ova.podcaststudio.questions_desc: You'll receive personalized recommendations for your case.
ova.podcaststudio.questions_voice: Answer 3 questions about your project and I'll give you personalized recommendations to create the best Audio Overview in NotebookLM.
ova.podcaststudio.q_content_type: What type of content do you have?
ova.podcaststudio.q_doc_count: How many documents do you have?
ova.podcaststudio.plan_desc: Based on your content, goal, and number of documents.
ova.podcaststudio.plan_voice: Great. Based on your answers, here is your personalized plan to create an Audio Overview in NotebookLM. Content type: {cTypeLabel}. Goal: {gLabel}. Documents: {dCountLabel}.
ova.podcaststudio.checklist_desc: Check each step as you complete it. You can have NotebookLM open in another tab.
ova.podcaststudio.checklist_voice: Here is your preparation checklist. Check each step as you complete it while working in NotebookLM. I'll guide you through the process.
ova.podcaststudio.completed_desc: You have everything ready to create your Audio Overview in NotebookLM. Now just listen to the result and take notes.
ova.podcaststudio.completed_voice: Excellent! You've completed all the steps. Now you have your Audio Overview generated in NotebookLM. Listen carefully and take notes on key points. Remember you can regenerate as many times as you want for different perspectives.
ova.chatgpttools.welcome_desc: Hi, I'm Valerio, your AI coach. In this lab we'll explore 5 key tools of the ChatGPT ecosystem: Web Search, Code Interpreter, DALL-E 3, Canvas and Memory. Let's discover their strengths together!
ova.chatgpttools.welcome_voice: Hi, I'm Valerio, your AI coach from Edutechlife. In this lab we'll explore 5 key tools of the ChatGPT ecosystem: Web Search, Code Interpreter, DALL-E 3, Canvas and Memory and Projects. We'll learn when to use each one and their limitations.
ova.chatgpttools.dashboard_desc: Explore the 5 dimensions of the ChatGPT ecosystem before taking on the strategic decision-making challenge.
ova.chatgpttools.challenge_desc: Analyze 5 real scenarios and choose the best tool.
ova.chatgpttools.report_score: You got {score} out of {total} strategic decisions correct.
ova.chatgpttools.profile_master: Master Level: You perfectly master each tool.
ova.chatgpttools.profile_advanced: Advanced Level: Good judgment, refine technical nuances.
ova.chatgpttools.profile_explorer: Explorer Level: Review the information cards again.
ova.chatgpttools.modal_tip: Tip: Copy and adapt this instruction for your Edutechlife workflows.
ova.chatgpttools.footer: Lab guided by Valerio — AI Coach from Edutechlife.
ova.ecosystem.welcome_desc: Hi, I'm Valerio, your AI coach. In this lab we'll explore the evolution of GPT models, their operation modes, integrated tools, and the art of strategic prompting.
ova.ecosystem.welcome_voice: Hi, I'm Valerio, your AI coach from Edutechlife. In this lab we'll explore the ChatGPT ecosystem: from the evolution of GPT models, operation modes, integrated tools, API connectivity, to the art of strategic prompting. Let's discover how to master each aspect.
ova.ecosystem.footer: Lab guided by Valerio — AI Coach from Edutechlife.
ova.notebooklab.welcome_title: Challenge: The Notebook of the Future
ova.notebooklab.welcome_hello: Hi! I'm Valerio, your AI coach.
ova.notebooklab.welcome_desc_p1: Welcome to the interactive NotebookLM lab. Let's explore this powerful Google tool that's transforming academic research.
ova.notebooklab.welcome_desc_p2: First you'll learn the key concepts, then we'll test your knowledge with 7 questions. Are you ready?
ova.notebooklab.welcome_audio: Hi! I'm Valerio, your AI coach. Welcome to the interactive NotebookLM lab. Let's explore this Google tool that's transforming academic research. First you'll learn the key concepts, then we'll test your knowledge with 7 questions.
ova.notebooklab.result_perfect_desc: You perfectly understand the symbiosis between AI and human curation. You're ready to lead academic innovation.
ova.notebooklab.result_good_desc: You have a great understanding of the capabilities and technological limits. Just refine some strategic details.
ova.notebooklab.result_bad_desc: Remember: AI processes, but you are in charge. We suggest reviewing the fundamentals to avoid passive dependency.
ova.notebooklab.footer: Lab guided by Valerio — AI Coach from Edutechlife.
ova.notebooksim.welcome_hello: Hi! I'm Valerio, your AI coach.
ova.notebooksim.welcome_desc_p1: In this simulator we'll test your document analysis skills. You'll learn to select sources, perform cross-synthesis, and develop critical thinking.
ova.notebooksim.welcome_desc_p2: First we'll review the key concepts, then 7 questions to evaluate your understanding. Let's begin!
ova.notebooksim.welcome_audio: Hi! I'm Valerio. In this simulator we'll test your document analysis skills. First we'll review key concepts, then 7 questions to evaluate your understanding.
ova.notebooksim.result_perfect_desc: You master the art of critical document analysis. You're ready for high-level research.
ova.notebooksim.result_good_desc: You have good foundations in document analysis. Keep practicing cross-synthesis and critical thinking.
ova.notebooksim.result_bad_desc: Document analysis is perfected with practice. We suggest reviewing the fundamentals of curation and synthesis.
ova.notebooksim.footer: Lab guided by Valerio — AI Coach from Edutechlife.
